title: Sort List (Merge Sort on Linked List)
pattern: Linked List â€” Merge Sort (Divide and Conquer)
coreIdea: Sort a linked list in O(n log n) time using merge sort adapted for linked lists: find the middle using fast/slow pointers to split the list, recursively sort both halves, then merge them like the standard merge-two-sorted-lists problem.
recognitionCues: asks to sort a linked list with O(n log n) time and typically O(1) extra space (excluding recursion) expected
rules out converting to array and sorting
approach: Base case: if list has 0 or 1 nodes, return as-is. Find middle using fast/slow pointers, split list into two halves. Recursively sort each half. Merge the two sorted halves using the standard two-pointer merge technique, returning the merged sorted list.
